summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements (REQ-57 through REQ-70). However, several specific acceptance criteria have gaps. REQ-59 (active nav link styling in Header.tsx) is not evidenced in the diff. REQ-69 CSV columns are missing several required fields (Phone, Size, Location, Timeline). The Settings preview only opens '/' rather than a page relevant to the current settings section. Most other requirements appear substantially implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the Header component (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx) so that the active navigation link is visually distinct from inactive links with bold font weight and/or underline/bottom border accent in gold/charcoal.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not include any modification to frontend/src/components/Header.tsx. No evidence of active link styling changes in the Header component.

missing_requirements.requirement: CSV export must include columns: Name, Email, Phone, Project Type, Size, Location, Budget Range, Timeline, Description, Date Submitted, Status.
missing_requirements.reason: The exportToCSV function in CommissionsManager.tsx uses headers ['Name', 'Email', 'Project Type', 'Budget', 'Description', 'Status', 'Date Submitted'], missing Phone, Size, Location, and Timeline columns.

hallucinated_features.description: CommissionsManager filter tabs include 'in-progress', 'completed', and 'declined' statuses instead of the spec-referenced 'Unread' and 'Responded' tab labels mentioned in REQ-69 AC.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-69 specifies the CSV export respects the active filter tab with options 'All, Unread, or Responded', but the implementation uses 'all', 'new', 'in-progress', 'completed', 'declined'.
